content.en:
That thing?

Most of the Peak Realm Gods didn't know what it was, and only a few Peak Realm Gods who were in charge of the treasure house of Taiqiong Mountain knew.

And because that thing was so weird, the Peak Realm Gods who bought the Galanbol Ship and left the ship quota didn't take it with them.

"It's a blood-colored fragment, like a fragment of some kind of weapon, and it can't be touched directly, otherwise it will be sucked dry of the Eternal Dao Seed. Moreover, he didn't dare to carry the void in his body with him, otherwise the void would collapse. A pinnacle realm god introduced, "Ever since we obtained this treasure in Taiqiong Mountain, we have been storing it in the deepest part of the treasure vault and blessed it with various seals. Moreover, the seal will continue to be blessed every once in a while, otherwise the seal will not last long. "

"An unknown weapon fragment, if it can be exchanged for the survival of Taiqiong Mountain, it is naturally worth it, but is that Ye Heavenly Realm God really willing?"

Another pinnacle realm god asked.

"I'll have to give it a try!" said the pinnacle realm god who made the suggestion.

Subsequently.

The three pinnacle realm gods went to retrieve the weapon fragment, and then left the Taiqiong Mountain with the weapon fragment.

They can enter and exit the realm of the rift and enter the realm of the eternal realm, the extradimensional storm of the eternal realm is not very powerful, they can hold on for a long time. 05 Soon.

They came to the entrance of the Endless Rift Realm and contacted the Ye Tian Realm God, wanting to exchange this weapon fragment for Ye Tian's attack.

......

"Taiqiong Mountain hasn't given up yet?"

Ye Tian didn't want to pay attention to Taiqiong Mountain, and he didn't think that Taiqiong Mountain could come up with anything good.

However, when he spied into the outside world and looked at the fragment of the weapon brought by those peak realm gods, he suddenly showed a look of surprise.

These pinnacle realm gods did not directly touch the fragment, but manipulated the extradimensional power of the extradimensional thing to wrap this weapon fragment, and the distance was relatively far.

Obviously, this weapon is very dangerous.

"This weapon ......"

Ye Tian was separated by a boundary gap realm and the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array, and he couldn't judge the origin of this weapon for a while, but it was absolutely extraordinary.

Swish!

Ye Tian came out of the Endless Realm Gap Realm and came to the Taiqiong Mountain, these peak realm gods.

"I've seen the Ye Heavenly Realm God!"

Several peak realm gods of Taiqiong Mountain said respectfully.

At this moment, they felt that the aura on Ye Tian's body was much stronger than in the past, and it was obvious that there was a breakthrough again, reaching a level that was difficult for them to guess.

"This weapon fragment, I want it, I can help you Taiqiong Mountain!"

Ye Tian directly agreed.

"Thank you Ye Heavenly Realm God!"

These peak realm gods said excitedly.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian said.

He followed these peak realm gods to the headquarters of Taiqiong Mountain.

"This extra-dimensional formation really won't last long!"

Ye Tian frowned.

Now there are cracks everywhere here, that is, those peak realm gods have been maintaining the formation and consuming a lot of resources to supply energy, otherwise this extradimensional formation would have been shattered a long time ago.

"Ye Heavenly Realm God, is there any other way to resist the extradimensional storm?"

A peak realm god of Taiqiong Mountain asked.

Ye Tian thought for a while and said, "There are two ways, one is to repair this extra-dimensional formation, but under the sweeping storm of the super-dimensional storm, this super-dimensional formation cannot be stopped, if it does not stop, it cannot be repaired." The second way, I sit here and maintain this extradimensional formation. "

Of course, there are other methods, such as transferring the members of Taiqiong Mountain, but in the process of transferring, it is likely to cause many members to fall, and if you transfer frequently, once the formation is broken, there will be many weak creatures falling.

Therefore, transfer is the most helpless way.

"Ye Heavenly Realm God, can you maintain this extradimensional formation?"

The pinnacle realm gods of Taiqiong Mountain were a little skeptical.

"No problem!"

Ye Tian said.

They couldn't refute it, so they could only let Ye Tian try.

Ye Tian entered the core of the super-dimensional formation of Taiqiong Mountain and took over this super-dimensional formation.

Immediately afterward, he urged the true extradimensional power.

Only the true power of the extra-dimensional can exert the power of the extra-dimensional formation.

After Ye Tian controlled this super-dimensional formation, he immediately easily resisted the super-dimensional storm, and the formation stabilized, and it would not continue to shatter in a short period of time.

Seeing this scene, the peak realm gods of Taiqiong Mountain were all dumbfounded. []

Easily stabilize this super-dimensional formation that is about to shatter with his own strength, what kind of strength is this?

Since Ye Tian was at the core of the formation and now completely controlled the formation, they didn't know that what Ye Tian was urging was the real extradimensional power.

However, they don't care about this either.

For them, it's good to be able to live.

......

Since Ye Tian stabilized the super-dimensional formation of Taiqiong Mountain, and sat in Taiqiong Mountain for a long time, until the end of the super-dimensional storm, Taiqiong Mountain also gave Ye Tian that weapon fragment.

Ye Tian took this fragment back to the human race and began to study this fragment.

"This small fragment can suck up the Eternal Dao Seed of a peak realm god, I wonder if it will absorb my Eternal Dao Seed?"

Ye Tian stretched out his hand and touched it.

Rumble!!!

A terrifying suction force came, and his Eternal Dao Seed was absorbed from the Origin Energy, and it would not be long before it was sucked dry.

"Extradimensional power, suppression!"

After Ye Tian urged the extradimensional power to suppress this fragment, the suction disappeared.

"It's such a terrifying absorption, the peak realm god who has not comprehended the power of the super dimension, no one 477 can resist it, no wonder the peak realm god of Taiqiong Mountain dare not touch it at all. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He began to study the fragment carefully, and after a long time, he finally had a guess in his mind.

If he hadn't guessed wrong, this weapon fragment should have been a fragment of an extradimensional dao soldier, and it was not an ordinary extradimensional dao soldier.

The Extra-Dimensional Dao Soldier is a weapon on top of the Extra-Dimensional Secret Treasure, which is refined by the existence of the Extra-Dimensional Realm, and there is no way to refine it in a half-step Extra-Dimensional Realm.

For example, the half-step super-dimensional realm that was killed by the Death Void at the beginning, and the little sword that was finally urged by the super-dimensional elves was very likely to be a super-dimensional dao soldier.

If you want to urge the super-dimensional dao soldiers, it is not enough to rely on the super-dimensional power, you also need a powerful super-dimensional realm dao power, and Ye Tian is only a peak realm god cultivator.

If he was given a superdimensional weapon, it would be difficult for him to urge it when he ran out of life.

However, this is only a fragment of the extradimensional dao soldier, maybe he has a way to urge it, but he has to create a superdimensional technique that can cooperate with him to manipulate this fragment, so that there is hope to urge.

Thereupon.

In the following days, Ye Tian worked hard to create such a transcendent technique, relying on the Jialan Stone Plate, spending hundreds of billions of years to the Dao Era, as well as countless attempts.

Finally on this day, he created.
